Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root ayres_crm -e "SELECT b.nama, tb.nama AS tipe, b.satuan FROM barang b JOIN tipe_barang tb ON tb.id = b.tipe_barang_id ORDER BY tb.nama, b.nama;" 2>&1)
Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root ayres_crm -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM orders LIKE 'dp_desain';" 2>&1)
Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root ayres_crm -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM orders LIKE 'kekurangan';" 2>&1)
Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root ayres_crm -e "SELECT o.id, o.no_order, oi.id as item_id, oi.paket_nama, oi.bahan_kain FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id;" 2>&1)
Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root ayres_crm -e "SELECT id, no_order, status FROM orders;" 2>&1)
Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root ayres_crm -e "UPDATE orders SET status = 'IN_PROGRESS' WHERE id = 1;" 2>&1)
Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root ayres_crm -e "UPDATE work_orders SET status = 'PROSES_PRODUKSI' WHERE status = 'PENDING';" 2>&1)
Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root ayres_crm -e "SELECT no_wo, paket, bahan FROM work_orders;" 2>&1)

Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root ayres_crm -e "
SELECT w.id, w.no_wo, w.order_id, w.paket, w.bahan,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(oi.paket_nama SEPARATOR ', '\) AS all_paket,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(oi.bahan_kain SEPARATOR ', '\) AS all_bahan
FROM work_orders w
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = w.order_id
GROUP BY w.id;
" 2>&1)

Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root ayres_crm -e "
UPDATE work_orders w
SET w.paket = \(SELECT GROUP_CONCAT\(oi.paket_nama SEPARATOR ', '\) FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.order_id = w.order_id\),
    w.bahan = \(SELECT GROUP_CONCAT\(oi.bahan_kain SEPARATOR ', '\) FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.order_id = w.order_id\);
" 2>&1)
